%Text automatically generated by txt2latex
\section*{NAME}
version - get the version of the Fortran library codata

\section*{LIBRARY}
codata (-libcodata, -lcodata)

\section*{SYNOPSIS}
{\ttfamily
Fortran: character(len=:), pointer version()

C: char* codata\_version()

Python: pycodata.\_\_version\_\_

}
\section*{DESCRIPTION}
Get the library version.

\section*{EXAMPLE}
Fortran:

\begin{verbatim}
      use codata
      print *, "version = ", version()

\end{verbatim}
C:

\begin{verbatim}
      include <stdio.h>
      include "codata.h"
      printf("version = %s\n", codata_version());

\end{verbatim}
Python:

\begin{verbatim}
      import pycodata
      print(f"version = {pycodata.__version__}")

\end{verbatim}
\section*{SEE ALSO}
codata(3)
